title: lupulus hillii
intro: Lupulus hillii, also known as the Hill's hop plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cannabaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for wound healing and pain relief. The health benefits of Lupulus hillii include reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and insomnia, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lupulus hillii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
